checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
CORS: open access (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Active bot blocking detected: Cloudflare, Cloudflare Challenge (active blocking)
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, hcaptcha, captcha
OAuth discovery found — supports client_credentials (machine-to-machine)
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~5454 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 2 JSON-LD blocks: Corporation, WebSite
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 416 divs with only 32 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 219/327 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 1/10 inputs have names, 10/10 have types
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 33 headings, well-structured
7 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
6 links with generic text ('click here', 'read more')
Good link accessibility: 257/270 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Returns 405 but missing Allow header

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~55,896 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 6% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 17 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~8,592 tokens (15% of page) — utility class bloat
Reading this page costs $0.07–$0.84 per load ($0.35–$4.19 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, complementary, contentinfo, main, navigation, region, search
4/84 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
Found 4 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
2 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
8 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 166ms
Moderate payload: 218KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 5 scripts, 2 styles, 84 images
Compression enabled: gzip

checks.name: agents_txt
findings: No agents.txt found — agents have no machine-readable permission manifest

checks.name: a2a
findings: No A2A Agent Card found (/.well-known/agent.json) — agents can't discover this service's capabilities

checks.name: x402
findings: No x402 discovery endpoint found
No HTTP 402 responses detected on common paths
No payment protocol signals detected
